body: Logbook entries exported from the EFB come through with a trailing 'Z' even for local Phoenix times, so the totals page double-counts night hours. We assume UTC on import but the source is local. Need to detect and normalize non-UTC timestamps before summing.
title: flightlog-cli: parse logbook entries with non-UTC timestamps

body: When a station drops the visibility group entirely (clear conditions), the parser throws instead of treating it as unlimited. Caught this pulling KSDL this morning. Should default to a sane value and keep going.
title: metar-fetch: handle missing visibility group in METAR

body: The 9-hole differential comes out about 0.1 low compared to working it by hand from the scorecard. I think it's a rounding step applied too early. Wrote up my Troon North round so it's easy to check.
title: golf-handicap-notes: 9-hole differential calculation off by 0.1

body: Looked up N512AT and the registry data came back from a cached page that's a couple weeks stale, so the owner field was wrong. Can we add a cache expiry or a --no-cache flag?
title: tail-number-lookup: N-number registry lookup returns stale data

body: A PGN file from one of Owen's games has inline { } comments after the moves and the viewer stops rendering at the first one. Would be nice to either show the comments or skip past them cleanly.
title: chess-pgn-viewer: PGN with move comments fails to render

body: Adding Saguaro and White Sands to the park dataset so the trip planner can route to them. Pulled the coordinates and entrance info from the NPS site. Daniel, let me know if the JSON shape looks right.
title: nps-trip-toolkit: add Saguaro + White Sands to park dataset

body: The CSV export from ForeFlight uses a different column order than the old format, so logbook-parser maps the PIC and total columns backwards. Attaching a sample header row.
title: logbook-parser: column mapping wrong for newer CSV export

body: Converting knots to mph the result is off in the second decimal place. I think the conversion factor is truncated. Small thing but it shows up in the wx-briefing output.
title: aviation-units: knots to mph conversion factor truncated

body: The glide ratio table assumes sea-level density. Up here at Scottsdale elevation the numbers are optimistic. Could we add a density-altitude correction input?
title: openglide: add density-altitude correction to glide ratio

body: The night-sky planner lists a moonrise time that's an hour off for Arizona since we don't do daylight saving. Same root cause as the logbook one, I bet. Tucson dark-sky trip is what tipped me off.
title: nightsky-cli: moonrise time off by an hour for Arizona

body: Logging a visit to Petrified Forest, the tracker recorded the date a day early because of the timezone offset. Entries should use the local park date, not UTC midnight.
title: parkpass-tracker: visit date logged a day early

body: The briefing helper prints the wind direction but not whether it's gusting. For deciding a tee time the gust factor matters more than the steady wind. Would like to show G knots when present.
title: wx-briefing: show gust factor in wind summary

body: Adding a few aviation memoirs to the search index and fixing the author-sort so 'von' and 'de' prefixes don't break alphabetization. Reading list was getting long enough to need it.
title: aviation-reading-list: author-sort breaks on name prefixes

body: The scorecard app crashes if you start a round and don't enter a score on the first hole before the second. Should allow blank holes and total only the entered ones.
title: golf-scorecard-ios: crash when first hole left blank

body: Trying to follow the docent tour preview locally but the script can't find the asset folder when run from outside the repo root. A relative path needs to be resolved against the script location.
title: docent-tour-scripts: asset path breaks when run from another dir

body: Want to pull weather for several airports in one call instead of looping. A --stations flag that takes a comma list and prints them in order would save me a lot of typing for cross-country planning.
title: metar-fetch: support fetching multiple stations at once

body: My exhibit notes for the Sky and Flight gallery have a couple of placards in the wrong order versus the actual floor layout. Reordering and adding the Wright section I missed.
title: sky-and-flight-exhibit-notes: reorder placards to match floor layout

body: The 4Runner trip planner double-counts the return leg of an out-and-back, so total miles read high. Daniel pointed out where the loop adds the segment twice.
title: national-park-trip-planner: round-trip miles double-counted

body: Copying Daniel's dotfiles, the aliases file assumes zsh but I'm on bash, so half the shortcuts don't load. Adding a guard so it sources the right block per shell.
title: dotfiles: aliases assume zsh and fail under bash

body: Working through the TypeScript starter with Daniel and the strict-null setting flags one of the sample functions I can't quite follow. Leaving this open as a note to ask him about optional chaining next session.
title: learning-typescript: strict-null check I don't understand yet
